fullText: in this video i'm going to show you how to block the merge of a pull request when your quality gate fails in sonar cube or sonar cloud here i have a decorated pull request where the quality gate is fail however i can still merge the pull request into master let's protect the master branch with a branch policy i just need to add a status check on the sonarcube or solarcloud qualitygate now that the build analysis has finished i can see how thanks to the new branch policy i cannot merge this pull request anymore because the quality gate is failed you
